channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Kai Cenat plans to launch a ‘streaming university’ to teach aspiring creators
item.description: Kai Cenat is launching a “streaming university.” Cenat announced his plans during a February 13 stream, explaining how he wants to help streamers both big and small learn from his success. “I’m going to rent out a university over a course of a weekend. It will be streaming university.
item.dc:creator: Max Ufberg, Fast Company

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fetterman blasts Musk over DOGE, IRS
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) went after tech billionaire Elon Musk over a report that his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has been trying to access an IRS system. “I want to save billions of your money and make our government more efficient.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: How to set up a home network like a pro
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you ensure a smooth online experience with a reliable, secure home network setup.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rumors Suggest Intel's Next-Gen 'Celestial' GPUs Will Use Xe3P Architecture and In-House Process
item.description: Intel's rumored next-gen 'Celestial' GPUs might utilize the Xe3P architecture and an in-house process, potentially increasing competition against AMD and Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: GenAI can make us dumber
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) tools based on deep learning are quickly gaining adoption, but their use is raising concerns about how they affect human thought.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian Disney Plus prices are going up again – here's what you can expect to pay
item.description: The price of a premium Disney Plus subscription will rise in March, the first streaming price increase of the year.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mac users beware: AI-powered malware threats are on the rise
item.description: Even Apple products are vulnerable to cybercriminals, and a new report suggests the owners of Mac products will have to be more vigilant this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: NASCAR 25, the new game from iRacing, will put Daytona 500 fans in the driver’s seat
item.description: The Daytona 500 is one of the more challenging races on the NASCAR circuit. The speedway is long and narrow, forcing drivers to be more aggressive. And the weather in central Florida doesn’t always cooperate. During the 2024 event, a deluge of rain had forced a Monday conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Michael Callahan, Fast Company

item.title: Plans to spend $400 million on ‘Armored Teslas’ vanish from State Department procurement list
item.description: Elon Musk’s unprecedented role in Donald Trump’s administration as overseer of government spending has raised questions about how he might police himself when one of his companies competes for official contracts.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Tech security 101: How to spot a hidden tracker on your car
item.description: 80% of stalking victims are tracked using tech. GPS trackers, like AirTags, are among the most popular ways to do it. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia partners with cybersecurity vendors for real-time monitoring
item.description: Nvidia has partnered with leading cybersecurity firms to provide real-time security protection using its accelerator and networking hardware in combination with its AI software.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: VP calls for ideology-free AI
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cisco doubles down on AI with new, updated certifications
item.description: Cisco this week furthered its commitment to help customers support and develop artificial intelligence systems by rolling out new certification and training courses aimed at teaching professionals everything from how to incorporate AI into specific roles to advanced networking design.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cisco data center switches feature baked-in security for AI, networking duties
item.description: Cisco has unwrapped a new family of data center switches it says will help customers more securely support large workloads and facilitate AI development across the enterprise.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Top translation apps for travelers
item.description: Travel abroad worry-free with these top translation apps for travelers. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson highlights some favorites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
